{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Ninecloud Court teams
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Court teams]] consist of twelve young Underlords and Underladies.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
